name: Sourdough Whole Wheat Banana Bread for R2d2
recipeInstructions:
1. Put ingredients in bread machine as suggested by manufacturer.
2. Place the dough disc or kneaded dough into a greased loaf pan.
3. Cover and allow to rise until nearly doubled in size, about 1 hour.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and bread sounds hollow when tapped.
6. Remove from the bread machine and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
